description: Register a Kafka resource providing producer and consumer factories

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource.

security_protocol.label: Security Protocol
security_protocol.description: Security protocol: PLAINTEXT, SSL, SASL_PLAINTEXT, SASL_SSL

sasl_username_env_var.label: SASL Username Env Var
sasl_username_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the SASL username

sasl_password_env_var.label: SASL Password Env Var
sasl_password_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the SASL password
